title: Hiring Production Engineer at Alstom India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Alstom India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Alstom India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alstom India Holdings Services:
Alstom India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
